message:
bd-3hy: implement many-to-many relationships with link tables

Add link table support to RelatedMany<T>:
- with_link_table() constructor for many-to-many relationships
- link() and unlink() methods to track pending operations
- take_pending_links/unlinks() for flush system access
- has_pending_ops() to check for uncommitted changes
- is_many_to_many() helper to check relationship type

Add Session::load_many_to_many() for batch loading:
- Single JOIN query through link table
- Groups children by parent PK hash
- Avoids N+1 problem for many-to-many relationships

Also fix Team test model primary_key_value() to return actual ID.

7 new unit tests for link/unlink functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
